title: VP - Infrastructure Architect
description:
Financial institution with large IT footprint in Singapore is seeking a seasoned Senior Infrastructure Solutions Lead to design and lead the implementation of robust, secure, and scalable IT infrastructure solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in banking infrastructure, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and a proven track record in large-scale transformation.

Key Responsibilities:

Infrsatructure Architecture & Design

  • Design and lead the implementation of enterprise-grade IT infrastructure solutions that meet organizational goals, regulatory requirements , and ensure high availability, scalability, and performance.
  • Develop and maintain the overall technology landscape and architecture roadmaps to guide regional and global rationalization efforts.
  • Create and uphold engineering and architecture documents as standard references for the organization.

Technology Leadership & Innovation

  • Contribute to organizational strategy by analyzing business demands, planning IT services, and defining technical architecture across infrastructure domains.
  • Lead and mentor system and implementation engineers in detailed design and execution following approved high-level architecture.
  • Leading implementation of hybrid cloud domains (Cloud, Storage, Network, Database, End User Services) and with external vendors/offshore partners to ensure synergy and successful delivery.
  • Design virtual platforms including Servers, Database, VM Machines, API, Network, etc

Qualifications & Experience:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.
  • Approximately 12 years of experience in IT infrastructure solutioning within the Financial Services industry, with prior experience as an Infrastructure Solution Architect in a multinational banking environment.
  • Good knowledge of Singpore MAS regulatory requirements

Technical Expertise:

  • Proven experience conceptualizing end-to-end technical architecture involving channels, systems, middleware, and data warehouse integration.
  • Proficiency in enterprise architecture, microservices, cloud computing, and system integration patterns.
  • Hands on experience with AWS/Azure cloud , Storage, and databases such as SQL Server and Oracle
  • Experience in Linux, Windows, Networking
  • Experience with VMWare and Hyper

Interested candidates please email your latest resume to subagio@tangspac.com

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
